programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Paul McCartney - The Space Within US
programme.desc: Paul McCartney presents this special performance of the US Tour, made in the United States, 11 weeks and 34 shows, playing great compositions of his solo career along with some Wings and Beatles songs.

programme.title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success.

programme.title: Justin Bieber - Live at Madison Square Garden
programme.desc: The film follows the pop star Justin Bieber during 10 days counting down to his performance at Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: Paramore - Live at the Roundhouse
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Scorpions - Forever And A Day: Live In Munich
programme.desc: After 50 years on stages all around the world, Germany's Scorpions decided it was time to embark on one last tour. This fully authorized documentary follows the hard rockers from their beginnings as young music fans to the present day.

programme.title: Def Leppard - Hysteria At The O2
programme.desc: Sheffield's finest make their long-awaited debut at London's O2m Arena in November 2018. Marking the 31st anniversary of Hysteria they played the whole of the ground breaking album in chronological order featuring hits like Pour Some Sugar on Me, Ani...

programme.title: Supertramp: Breakfast In America: Live in Paris
programme.desc: Supertramp's Breakfast In America was the biggest selling album in the world in 1979. Following the album's release Supertramp embarked on a 10-month world tour which arrived in Paris at the end of November.

programme.title: J Balvin - Bruuttal
programme.desc: J. Balvin returns to his hometown of Medellín, Colombia to perform a special anniversary concert entitled BRUUTTAL. A musical journey that begins with his early songs and ends with his most recent, multi-platinum album, Energía.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Rapper 50 Cent shows off his Los Angeles home and fleet of exotic cars. Catch crooner Miguel, as he goes on tour and talks about his comparisons to Prince.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Trey Songz talks about his humble beginnings singing for rappers Twista and P Diddy. Waka Flocka shows the world why he is still relevant in today's world of music.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Usher, one of the most private artists in the industry, opens up about his personal life and what really happened between him and Tboz.

programme.title: Beyoncé: Fierce and Fabulous
programme.desc: The multi-platinum award winning recording artist has recently released her latest studio album, self titled Beyonce. Beyonce first captured the public's eye when she was the lead singer in Destiny's child.

programme.title: Will.I.Am: The Way I Am
programme.desc: The complete life story of songwriter, producer and entrepreneur- Will.I.Am. From “being raised in the ghetto’ to forming The Black Eyed Peas, everything Will.I.Am touches turns to gold. He has dabbled in fashion, technology, acting and business.

programme.title: James Brown: The Golden Greats
programme.desc: Experience

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Symba, a rapper from The Bay Area, tells his life story and how he ultimately landed a deal with Atlantic Records and his first national tour.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on Big Boss Vette, a rapper from St. Louis. It depicts Vette's life of trials and tribulations, hitting rock bottom and bouncing back to sky high success.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: The third episode tells the story of known battle rapper, Hitman Holla. Growing up in the dangerous city of St. Louis, rising to fame on the television show Wild 'n Out, and taking his music career beyond battle rapping.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode of Future Superstar focuses on punk rock rapper Klondike Blonde. Raised by a single father, Klondike discovered her love for music at a young age. After moving to Atlanta, she shortly rose to fame. This is her story.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: JD is a triple-threat entertainer who rose to fame in commercials and then skyrocketed when he became the voice of Young Simba in the Lion King remake. Raw talent and a genuine passion for his craft make JD a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: The sixth episode tells the story of Long Beach rapper, DW Flame. After spending 18 months in jail, DW was exonerated and attacked the vocal booth with renewed hunger, detailing the adversities he had overcome.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Jilly has all the makings of a star. We explore the challenges she faced thus far in the music industry and see how her determination is respected in the music space.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: TRAETWOTHREE is ready to show the world he is the next superstar out of South Central, blending dusky R&B, hip-hop swagger, and West Coast spirit.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Nick Cannon introduces the world to his new R&B boy band, Pop Money. We'll witness the highs and lows of the band's first tour as well as their initial success as they release their debut EP.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Nick Cannon sits down with VIBE editor-in-chief Datwon Thomas to make their predictions for the season 1 artists and where their careers will take them.

programme.title: Snoop Dogg: Uncaged
programme.desc: From Crime to Primetime. For over five decades rapper, songwriter, and media personality Calvin Cordozar Broadus Jr. aka 'Snoop Dogg' would go onto global fame, with tens of millions of record sales and a career in movies and television.

programme.title: 50 Cent: Rap Star
programme.desc: He’s the winner of 13 Billboard Music Awards, a Grammy Award, and six World Music Awards. His dark and edgy lyrics portray his life as a gangster, a criminal and a survivor of drugs. His music reflects the hardship he went through to become what he is.

programme.title: Lil Wayne: Bling
programme.desc: Releasing his first solo studio album at just the age of 15, Lil Wayne has shot through the ranks of the hip-hop scene. He has challenged societal ideas about image and has really become the representative of modern hip-hop. Follow the story of the man...

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grab a cold lemonade and follow along with Bob Ross as he leads you through wooded beauty into a hot summer swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy this fascinating experience of watching Bob Ross bring these deep dark woods alive; incredible magic on a partial black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the golden glow of sunrise, join Bob Ross for a refreshing look at early morning where anglers work and thrive.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll along a wonderful hustling, bubbling river with Bob Ross and enjoy the emergence of springtime blossoms on spectacular trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints the very best of nature -- stately evergreens and cool, still waters standing before a glorious brown mountain. A real beauty!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: This beautiful lake in the glen will leave you fully rested and at peace with the world; Bob Ross creates a quiet mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the warm swampy air and admire the overgrown trees with hanging Spanish moss and velvety bushes … all Bob Ross style of course!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with Bob Ross when you visit this towering ice mountain as it protects the misty falls and chilly lake in the valley.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Dana Jester creates a Bob Ross-style mountain scene with dignified foothills and evergreens, and super vibrant bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a meadow where evening breezes blow upon soft grasses and where you feel the warmth from a rustic little cabin.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In an almost watercolor appearance, Bob Ross paints this amazing secluded waterfall masterpiece with interesting tree and rock formations.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a beautiful monochromatic scene with delicate leafless trees and a rich grassy meadow cuddling a sweet cottage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a quaint little home with Bob Ross and experience the beauty of tender morn in the stillness of the forest; what a delightful painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relax with Bob Ross as the perfect picnic spot emerges from his paint filled brushes - quiet peaks on a tranquil lake and luscious green velvety grass.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A snow-covered winter fantasy land seems so real, and Bob Ross shows you how easy his special painting technique can be.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join guest artist Steve Ross today -- experience the magnificence of splendid mountains and glassy lake embraced by leafy trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of a cold, wintry forest, Bob Ross gently places a magical little wooden shanty upon a bed of soft snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: With brush in hand, Bob Ross leads you on a summertime nature walk, as you uncover the beauty of leafy trees and ponds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross shows you how two beautiful mountain and evergreen oval scenes can be harmonized into one memorable masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Capture a vision of glory with Bob Ross as you view the brilliance of afternoon sunlight peeking over a distant mountain top.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy guest artist Dana Jester and his dark soft forest; discover the brilliance of the sun's glow bouncing off a quiet stream and majestic oaks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the golden radiance of a setting sun with Bob Ross as night hastens over a softly blended knoll - you'll be home at last, just down trail's end.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross and experience the magic of early morning in an oval, as gentle trickles and splashes of a happy stream pierce the silence.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will fascinate you with this crimson winter scene, where cabin and snow are virtually undisturbed and the evergreens are full.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Venture into the heart of Americana with Bob Ross and discover the serenity of a snow-covered farmhouse and barn on a cold January day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Something new and different -- paint a wintry country scene on a wooden sawblade with guest artist Dorothy Dent.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us deep into the southeastern peninsula to create a beautiful scene with still blue waters and bright green mossy trees.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Transylvania Goulash, Beans and Greens; Swiss Chard Salad; all about heirloom beans

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Butter-Basted Fish Fillets with Garlic and Thyme; Succotash with Butter Beans, Corn, and Red Pepper

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Test cook Dan Souza and host Julia Collin Davison teach us to make Grill-Roasted Chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
